strengths: Extensive 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains
Proven AI-agent infrastructure contributions and open-source AI/ML tooling (e.g., MCP code generators, GISCollective)
Strong technical leadership and knowledge-sharing track record through workshops, talks, and open-source projects
concerns: No explicit evidence of master’s/PhD in AI-related field, despite preferred qualification
Limited documentation of direct cloud platform strategy experience or AI product ownership at scale
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting customer-facing roles in Berlin-based cloud/AI teams
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates deep, hands-on engineering expertise spanning AI-agent systems, cloud infrastructure, and scalable platforms, with strong leadership through open-source contributions and technical mentoring. While he lacks a formal AI advanced degree and explicit cloud strategy ownership, his practical AI implementation and product-building experience align closely with core responsibilities. The language barrier is minor but noted.
